summary: Completed frontend testing of Pet Soul Journey and context-aware CTAs. All 7 features tested and passed. Guest users see membership sales page on /membership and 'Become a Member' on homepage. Logged-in users with pets see PetSoulJourney on /membership and PersonalizedDashboard on homepage with pet-specific content.
critical_code_review_comments: MembershipPage.jsx correctly checks user && userPets.length > 0 && !loadingPets to show PetSoulJourney
Membership.jsx also has the same conditional logic for PetSoulJourney
Home.jsx correctly shows PersonalizedDashboard for logged-in users with pets
Home.jsx shows 'Become a Member' button only for guest users (hero-become-member-btn)
Home.jsx shows 'Start Your Pet Soul' button for logged-in users without pets (hero-add-pet-btn)
PetSoulJourney component shows pet name, soul score, 8 pillars progress, achievements, and next actions
Pet switcher works correctly - clicking different pet updates all content
PersonalizedDashboard shows 'Welcome back' greeting with pet name and Pet Soul progress
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Soul Journey and context-aware CTAs fully functional. Test user dipali@clubconcierge.in has 2 pets (Mojo - Indie, Mystique - Shihtzu). Mojo has 57% Pet Soul Score, Mystique has 0%. Homepage shows PersonalizedDashboard for logged-in users with pets. /membership shows PetSoulJourney for logged-in users with pets.

guest_membership_page.shows_sales_pitch: PASS - Shows 'The Longer You're With Us, The Less You Explain'
guest_membership_page.shows_12_pillars: PASS - Shows 12 Pillars of Pet Life section
guest_membership_page.shows_pricing: PASS - Shows Simple, Transparent Pricing section

logged_in_membership_with_pets.shows_8_pillars: PASS - Identity & Temperament, Family & Pack, etc. visible

pet_switcher.switch_to_mystique: PASS - Clicking Mystique button switches pet
pet_switcher.content_updates: PASS - 'What We Know About Mystique' visible after switch
pet_switcher.soul_score_updates: PASS - 0% Pet Soul Score for Mystique

personalized_dashboard_features.pet_switcher: PASS - Mojo and Mystique buttons visible
personalized_dashboard_features.drip_question: PASS - 'Does Mojo have any food allergies I should know about?'
personalized_dashboard_features.mira_section: PASS - 'Talk to Mira about Mojo' section visible

context_aware_ctas.logged_in_hero_cta: PASS - No 'Become a Member', shows personalized content
context_aware_ctas.pillars_section_logged_in: PASS - 'Add Your Pet to Unlock All Pillars'
